n_S.description: Number of startup categories per thermal generator

ell.description: Startup lag for each startup category of each generator

C_su.description: Startup cost for each startup category of each generator

n_L.description: Number of piecewise production breakpoints per generator

P.description: Piecewise production breakpoints for each generator

C.description: Piecewise variable production cost at each breakpoint for each generator

C_fixed.description: Fixed cost incurred when a thermal generator is on during a time period

L.description: Demand requirement at each time period

R.description: Spinning reserve requirement at each time period

P_min.description: Minimum thermal output of each generator

P_max.description: Maximum thermal output of each generator

P_wind_min.description: Minimum renewable output for each wind generator at each time period

P_wind_max.description: Maximum renewable output for each wind generator at each time period

SU.description: Startup ramp limit for each generator

SD.description: Shutdown ramp limit for each generator

U.description: Minimum up time for each generator

D.description: Minimum down time for each generator

assumptions.description: Number of time periods is positive.

code.python: assert T >= 1

assumptions.description: Number of thermal generators is positive.

code.python: assert n_G >= 1

assumptions.description: Number of wind generators is positive.

code.python: assert n_W >= 1

assumptions.description: Each generator has at least one startup category.

code.python: assert all(n_S[g] >= 1 for g in range(n_G))

assumptions.description: Each generator has at least one piecewise breakpoint.

code.python: assert all(n_L[g] >= 1 for g in range(n_G))
assert all(ell[g][s] >= 0 for g in range(n_G) for s in range(n_S[g]))
assert all(C_su[g][s] >= 0 for g in range(n_G) for s in range(n_S[g]))
assert all(P[g][l] >= 0 for g in range(n_G) for l in range(n_L[g]))

assumptions.description: Piecewise variable production costs are non-negative.

code.python: assert all(C[g][l] >= 0 for g in range(n_G) for l in range(n_L[g]))
assert all(C_fixed[g] >= 0 for g in range(n_G))

assumptions.description: Demand at each time period is non-negative.

code.python: assert all(L[t] >= 0 for t in range(T))
assert all(R[t] >= 0 for t in range(T))
assert all(P_min[g] >= 0 for g in range(n_G))
assert all(P_max[g] >= 0 for g in range(n_G))
assert all(P_wind_min[w][t] >= 0 for w in range(n_W) for t in range(T))
assert all(P_wind_max[w][t] >= 0 for w in range(n_W) for t in range(T))
assert all(RU[g] >= 0 for g in range(n_G))
assert all(RD[g] >= 0 for g in range(n_G))
assert all(SU[g] >= 0 for g in range(n_G))
assert all(SD[g] >= 0 for g in range(n_G))

assumptions.description: Minimum up times are at least one period.

code.python: assert all(U[g] >= 1 for g in range(n_G))

assumptions.description: Minimum down times are at least one period.

code.python: assert all(D[g] >= 1 for g in range(n_G))
assert all(MR[g] in (0, 1) for g in range(n_G))

assumptions.description: Maximum thermal output is at least the minimum thermal output for each generator.

code.python: assert all(P_max[g] >= P_min[g] for g in range(n_G))

assumptions.description: Maximum renewable output is at least the minimum renewable output for each wind generator and time period.

code.python: assert all(P_wind_max[w][t] >= P_wind_min[w][t] for w in range(n_W) for t in range(T))

u.description: On status of generator g at time t

v.description: Startup indicator of generator g at time t (1 if started)

w.description: Shutdown indicator of generator g at time t (1 if shut down)

d_su.description: Startup category selection for generator g, category s, at time t (ragged by n_S[g])

lam.description: Piecewise convex combination weight for generator g, breakpoint l, at time t (ragged by n_L[g])

p.description: Thermal output above P_min for generator g at time t

r.description: Spinning reserve of generator g at time t

c_var.description: Variable production cost above fixed cost for generator g at time t

P_bar.description: EC3c auxiliary: maximum reachable output of generator g at time t

constraints.description: Demand balance: total thermal and renewable output equals demand at each period.

code.gurobipy:
for t in range(T):
    model.addConstr(gp.quicksum(p[g, t] + P_min[g] * u[g, t] for g in range(n_G)) == L[t])

constraints.description: Spinning reserve: total reserve meets or exceeds requirement at each period.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(r[g, t] for g in range(n_G)) >= R[t] for t in range(T))

constraints.description: Commitment transition: links on-status to startup and shutdown indicators.
constraints.formulation: u_{g,t} - u_{g,t-1} = v_{g,t} - w_{g,t} \quad \forall g, t \ge 1

constraints.description: Minimum up time: a generator that starts must remain on for at least U[g] periods.
Minimum down time: a generator that shuts down must remain off for at least D[g] periods.
Startup decomposition: startup indicator equals sum of startup category selections.
Startup category timing: category s can only be selected if the generator was off for the required lag.
Must-run: generators with MR[g]=1 must remain on at all times.
Startup derating: net output above minimum is limited by startup ramp during startup periods.
constraints.formulation: p_{g,t} + r_{g,t} \le (P^{\max}_g - P^{\min}_g) u_{g,t} - \max(P^{\max}_g - SU_g, 0) v_{g,t} \quad \forall g, t

constraints.description: Shutdown derating: net output above minimum is limited by shutdown ramp the period before shutdown.
constraints.formulation: p_{g,t} + r_{g,t} \le (P^{\max}_g - P^{\min}_g) u_{g,t} - \max(P^{\max}_g - SD_g, 0) w_{g,t+1} \quad \forall g, t < T-1

constraints.description: Ramp-up limit: output plus reserve cannot increase by more than RU[g] from the previous period.
constraints.formulation: p_{g,t} + r_{g,t} - p_{g,t-1} \le RU_g \quad \forall g, t \ge 1

constraints.description: Ramp-down limit: output cannot decrease by more than RD[g] from the previous period.
Piecewise production: output equals the convex combination of production breakpoints above minimum.
Piecewise cost: variable cost equals the convex combination of cost breakpoints above fixed cost.
Piecewise weights: convex combination weights sum to on-status.
Piecewise weights are at most one.
EC3c: P_bar is bounded by ramp reachability from previous period with shutdown derating at current period t.
constraints.formulation: \overline{P}_{g,t} \le P^{\min}_g u_{g,t} + (P^{\max}_g - P^{\min}_g) u_{g,t-1} - \max(P^{\max}_g - SD_g, 0) w_{g,t} + RU_g \quad \forall g, t \ge 1

objective.description: Minimize total production cost (fixed on-cost plus variable cost) and startup costs over all generators and time periods.

code.gurobipy: model.setObjective(gp.quicksum(c_var[g, t] + C_fixed[g] * u[g, t] for g in range(n_G) for t in range(T)) + gp.quicksum(C_su[g][s] * d_su[g, s, t] for g in range(n_G) for s in range(n_S[g]) for t in range(T)), GRB.MINIMIZE)

notes: Generator $g$'s maximum available output in period $t$ is bounded by the reachable level from $t-1$ assuming shutdown derating is applied at $t$.
